course_description.overview: The NXT Classic (formerly Volta NXT Classic) is a season-opening gran fondo held in South Limburg featuring the iconic climbs of the Amstel Gold Race region, including Cauberg and Keutenberg. Participants choose from multiple distance options (65–150 km) with approximately 2,000 meters of elevation gain across hilly terrain in the Voerstreek area.

key_segments.name: Cauberg
key_segments.description: Iconic climb featured in the Amstel Gold Race

key_segments.name: Keutenberg
key_segments.description: Iconic climb featured in the Amstel Gold Race

course_description.difficulty_narrative: The NXT Classic is positioned as a serious climbing test and season opener, with significant elevation gain distributed across the hilly Limburg landscape. The course incorporates professional-level climbs, making it challenging for riders seeking early-season fitness assessment.

logistics.getting_there: Located in Eijsden, South Limburg, Netherlands, near the Belgian border in the Voerstreek region.
logistics.accommodation: South Limburg is a developed tourist region with standard accommodation options available.
logistics.registration_details: Multiple distance options available (65–150 km). CycloWorld offers a 25% discount on entry tickets. Registration available through CycloWorld and official event channels.
logistics.bike_logistics: Road bikes and gravel bikes are both accepted for the event.
logistics.local_considerations: The event is held on Easter Monday (April 6, 2026), which may affect local services and accommodation availability.

final_verdict.one_liner: A well-established, accessible season opener featuring professional-level climbs in a scenic hilly region with strong value and community atmosphere.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Riders seeking an early-season fitness test on iconic climbs; cyclists familiar with Amstel Gold Race terrain; gran fondo enthusiasts in Northern Europe; those wanting multiple distance options for varying fitness levels.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes. The NXT Classic offers excellent value with professional-grade climbs, flexible distance options, a 25% discount through CycloWorld, and established event infrastructure. The Easter Monday timing and South Limburg location provide strong logistical accessibility.
pro_tips: Book accommodation early due to Easter Monday timing and limited regional capacity
Use the 25% CycloWorld discount for registration
Choose the appropriate distance option (65–150 km) based on early-season fitness
Arrive early to experience the Voerstreek atmosphere and scout the Cauberg and Keutenberg climbs
